name: antigravity-seo
description: Comprehensive SEO analysis and Blog creation/authority skill suite for Antigravity.

interface.shortDescription: Run SEO audits, content quality analysis, and automated blog creation.
interface.longDescription: Antigravity SEO & Blog Suite combines a professional local SEO analysis engine with a complete blog creation and content authority operating system. Includes 2 orchestrators, 56 specialist workflows, 29 agent profiles, shared cache artifacts, and deterministic headless runners.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website for SEO issues.
Check schema and Core Web Vitals for this URL.
Build an SEO action plan for this business.
Write a structured blog post about local SEO trends.
Optimize my blog content for search engines.
